info.name: EduVerse API - Complete Test Collection
info.description:
Comprehensive API test collection for all EduVerse endpoints.

Test Accounts (ALL use password: SecureP@ss123):
- Admin: admin.tarek@example.com
- Instructor: instructor.tarek@example.com
- Student: student.tarek@example.com
- TA: ta.tarek@example.com
- IT Admin: it_admin.tarek@example.com

Run the "Authentication" folder first to populate tokens.

exec: pm.test("Status 200 or 401 (token may not be valid)", () => pm.expect([200,401]).to.include(pm.response.code));
